title: My trading bot with additional filters and rules. Tell me your thoughts on my problem and conclusion.
author: Temporary_Fun_7973
selftext:
1st pic:

I moved rr from 0.7 to 1.7 bc it's making same amount of trades with similar winrate and I made bot that highers the risk with growth of balance (if u have 100$ u risk 1$ if u have 120$ u risk 1.2$), before that it was making 100$ into 384.9$. Just my normal bot with no additional filters just added 1.7rr instead of 0.7 it made 81.17% winrate.

2nd pic:

I added artificial spread, this is how it works. Standard spread is 0.5pips (some average for eurusd but depends on broker), 1.5 pips spread when we have Asia session and 2.5pips spread when liquidity is low.

3rd pic:

I removed Asia session trading, and also added rule where it puts bigger sl than it would usually. This is the most life-changing part 1.5pips of additional sl room.

4th pic:

I added back Asia session, but new rule for Asia is that it's sl is now bigger by 3.0 pips (instead of usual 1.5pips). 

Problems:

News are very very hard to be made artificialy, I'm not even near that skilled to do it. My pips are negative but chatgpt gave me some answer on it and long story short pips are irrelevant bc my rr overcomes the loss or something like that (I'll deal with that later). And maybe less important micro movement (it is rare to blow out trade bc od sudden micro movements, I trade for like 4 years now and usualy when micro movements make your trade go sl it was usually already a loss)

Possible solutions:

For live trading I'll probably add Avoidance of Big impact news, but not for whole time, instead just for the first 10-15-30 minutes bc as far as I figure our only the fist 5 minutes to several more minutes of those news are very dangerous after that first wave it's more or less good I mean yeah they have impact but not that big impact it still follows some trend or it makes new one and you need to deal with it. One more solution for problems of artificial spread is to move z-score from 3.0 to 3.2 and higher usual sl to 3.0 instead of 1.5 and during Asia it's maybe good idea to move it to 4.0pips instead of 3.0

comments.author: chabiz_karoline
comments.body: The scammers who sent me those files planted a virus on my computer, and now I can't turn it on. I'm really upset

replies.author: Temporary_Fun_7973
replies.body: What? I never shared my bot and I haven't even finished it yet.

replies.author: chabiz_karoline
replies.body: It wasn’t you, but those people who posted “milestones,” claiming they were going to share documents and strategies. Instead, I ended up with malware, or they added me to some scam group.

comments.author: eggrally
comments.body: Back testing is never the same as real testing on real market,  test it out on the market

replies.author: Temporary_Fun_7973
replies.body: I'll try it soon on real market

comments.author: Spare_Subject_7069
comments.body: deploy it on a sim account with artificial slippage. backtesting only does so much. maybe do some OOS testing

comments.author: regnull
comments.body: If you torture data long enough it will confess. Real money test is the only one that matters.

comments.author: Standard_Boot_8165
comments.body: What concept are u using to building this and tha backtest u had done what is that data year ??

replies.author: Temporary_Fun_7973
replies.body: I'm using mean reversion (z score) strategy, I used in this particular time 2025year. If I didn't answer you something please let me knkw English is not my 1st language

replies.author: Standard_Boot_8165
replies.body: Language is the second matter first one is what rules and what are the thing u got covered to do the reverse enginerring and make this bot and how does it work like it analyse the market on which timeframe and what concept does it follow to execute order

replies.author: Temporary_Fun_7973
replies.body:
Rules:
Z score needs to be at -3/+3, trend strength above 1.8, always add 1.5 pips on original sl and 3.0 pips on sl during Asia, no multiple trades, it analyzes market by mathematical formula that uses average moving price... and it's analyzing 15M but on 1M time frame so that I can get mimicry of the real market movement. It also has formula for execution If u want I can post it when I get home.

replies.author: datusernamechecks0ut
replies.body: This is what I was thinking.

comments.author: namcand
comments.body: Run it on demo live because i can sit on my laptop and write you a 4900% backtest results but when running live it's not even close

comments.author: Dev-Trade
comments.body: Which data API are you using?

comments.author: Important_Water_7198
comments.body: Is it profitable after slippage and comission? Did you try it out of sample? Also if you used an optimizer: differentiate the returns and shuffle them (N times) and integrate them again, then run the optimizer on that shuffled series, if the current trading system is not out of distribution of the shuffled ones, then you have overfit. Hope that helps 😄

comments.author: EWScience
comments.body: Do you have any breakeven threshold or are all outcomes W/L?

replies.author: Temporary_Fun_7973
replies.body: No, I wanted to see how will it preform without it I'll probably set it later after live test
